signals.reasoning: BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL has already moved far enough into flush territory that I would rather wait for a bounce than force a new short here.
ZEN is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
MON remains a reduced-size short because it is still weak and funding is still positive, which keeps the downside pressure intact.
PURR is already down hard and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
RENDER is already weak and does not offer a clean enough new entry versus just waiting for a bounce.
RESOLV has upside momentum, but liquidity is too poor to justify forcing a fresh long here.
WCT is too low-liquidity and too unstable after the move to trust for a serious fresh trade.
AERO is one of the clearest shorts on the board because price is down hard while open interest is still rising, which suggests the selloff is not fully exhausted yet.
VVV is already in a liquidation-flush state and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
TNSR has squeeze fuel from negative funding, but liquidity is too poor and the tape is still too fragile to force a long.
PENDLE is already weak and too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
ZEREBRO is too illiquid and too unstable to trust for a fresh directional trade.
DYM is already down hard and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
VINE remains a valid reduced-size short because price is weak and funding is still extremely positive, which leaves the long side crowded.
WLFI is still the only real long candidate because funding is deeply negative while price and open interest are both rising together, but confidence stays moderate in this macro tape.
ORDI is already weak and too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh short entry after the move.
TON remains a modest catch-down short lean because it is still green relative to the broader tape and has not fully unwound yet.
GRIFFAIN is already weak and too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh short entry after the move.
